without_skill_failures: Calls AddBff().ConfigureOpenIdConnect() (BFF v4 fluent API)
Calls AddBff().ConfigureCookies() or equivalent to configure cookie options through the BFF builder
Configures the remote API proxy using builder.Services.AddRemoteApis(options => { ... }) to register the remote API base address
Maps the remote API endpoint using app.MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint("/api/todos", "https://api.example.com/todos") with .WithAccessToken(RequiredTokenType.User)
Uses RequiredTokenType enum (not TokenType) for the access token requirement
Calls AddEntityFrameworkServerSideSessions with a lambda configuring UseSqlServer
Calls AddSessionCleanupBackgroundProcess() on the BFF builder to enable automatic session cleanup
Uses AddBff() fluent API (not a separate AddServerSideSessions call)
The code compiles without mixing up BFF session store APIs with IdentityServer session store APIs
Mentions configuring the BFF proxy to forward the access token via .WithAccessToken(RequiredTokenType.User) or .WithAccessToken(RequiredTokenType.UserOrClient)
Uses AddBffBlazorClient() for client-side Blazor BFF integration
Uses AddFrontend() to configure the Blazor frontend
Mentions or configures the BFF management endpoints accessible from the Blazor client
References specific IAccessTokenRetriever interface from Duende.Bff and shows how to register the custom retriever
Configures YARP through BFF using AddBffExtensions() on the YARP reverse proxy builder
Maps YARP routes through BFF using MapBffReverseProxy()
Uses RequiredTokenType (not TokenType) in YARP route metadata for access token type
Shows YARP route metadata configuration with Duende.Bff.Yarp.TokenType key and RequiredTokenType value
Configures the remote API using AddRemoteApis() to register the base address
Maps the endpoint using MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint with .WithAccessToken(RequiredTokenType.UserOrClient)
Uses RequiredTokenType.UserOrClient (not .User) to support both interactive and machine-to-machine tokens
Uses .SkipResponseHandling() on the BFF remote API endpoint configuration
Implements a custom IAccessTokenRetriever to add custom logic for token retrieval
Configures both AddRemoteApis and MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint correctly
Uses RequiredTokenType enum values (not TokenType)
References the Duende.Bff.Yarp package for YARP BFF integration
Uses AddBffExtensions() on the YARP reverse proxy builder
Configures YARP route metadata with Duende.Bff.Yarp.TokenType key
Uses MapBffReverseProxy() to map YARP routes through BFF
Mentions /bff/login, /bff/logout, /bff/user as the BFF management endpoints
Mentions the anti-forgery header requirement (X-CSRF: 1) for BFF endpoints
Shows how to configure BFF management endpoints using MapBffManagementEndpoints()
References AddEntityFrameworkServerSideSessions for BFF session storage
Mentions AddSessionCleanupBackgroundProcess() for automatic cleanup of expired sessions
Uses RequiredTokenType (not TokenType) for token requirements
Shows specific BFF v4 API methods like MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint or YARP metadata
